name: Pineapple-Walnut Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cottage cheese and sour cream in a blender or food processor.
2. Add the crushed pineapple, chopped walnuts, lemon juice, and lemon zest to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Makes about 2 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Vanilla Wafers, Chicken, Pears, Strawberries
